highlights.description: Interactive entity-relationship diagram visualization for Ent.go schemas
Generate standalone HTML files deployable to GitHub Pages
NPM module with Cytoscape.js for custom integrations

added.description: JSON schema types for entscape format with Go types and JSON Schema generation
AST-based Ent schema parser extracting entities, fields, edges, indexes, and mixins
JSON exporter with source links for GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket
`entscape generate` command to parse Ent schema and export JSON
`entscape serve` command with local development server and hot-reload
`entscape schema` command to generate JSON Schema document
`entscape html` command for standalone HTML visualization output
`--web` flag for serve command to serve static files
HTML generation package with embedded Cytoscape.js template
NPM module (`@grokify/entscape`) with TypeScript types and Cytoscape.js renderer
Dagre layout for hierarchical ER diagram visualization
Interactive features: hover tooltips, entity click handlers, highlight connected nodes
Example HTML for testing renderer with development server

fixed.description: Address golangci-lint gosec warnings for HTTP timeouts and template.JS

tests.description: Schema unit tests for JSON round-tripping and constants
Parser tests with 5-entity sample schema (User, Post, Profile, Comment, Group)
Export unit tests for JSON marshaling and URL generation

documentation.description: README with installation, usage examples, and features
MkDocs site with Material theme for documentation
Documentation pages: getting started, CLI reference, JSON schema, demo
Interactive ERD demo embedded in documentation
README badges for Go version, license, and documentation

build.description: Initial project setup with Go module and dependencies
Gitignore for build outputs and IDE files
